original_abstract: The mechanism for synthesizing CDs remains unclear. This graphical abstract proposes a one-step hydrothermal method for CD formation from 4-aminoantipyrine, with varying reaction times. It illustrates the key steps involved in the synthesis process.
humanized_abstract: The synthesis mechanism of CDs is still unclear. In this graphical abstract, a one-step hydrothermal method from 4-aminoantipyrine at different time periods was proposed to illustrate the possible process to synthesize CDs.

document.output: The synthesis mechanism of CDs is still unclear. In this graphical abstract, a one-step hydrothermal method from 4-aminoantipyrine at different time periods was proposed to illustrate the possible process to synthesize CDs.
